Possible causes: IMG-04 texture or the URP particle shader was missing at asset-integration time (Editor/AssetIntegration.BuildHitVfxPrefab logs [DEGRADED] and skips prefab creation in that case), the prefab save step failed, or Editor/AssetIntegration.IntegrateAll simply hasn't been run yet for this scene.
